recommendations.title: Hustle & Flow
recommendations.overview: With help from his friends, a Memphis pimp in a mid-life crisis attempts to become a successful hip-hop emcee.

recommendations.title: Dolemite Is My Name
recommendations.overview: The story of Rudy Ray Moore, who created the iconic big screen pimp character Dolemite in the 1970s.

recommendations.title: Black Snake Moan
recommendations.overview: A God-fearing bluesman takes to a wild young woman who, as a victim of childhood sexual abuse, is looking everywhere for love, but never quite finding it.

recommendations.title: Footloose
recommendations.overview: Ren MacCormack is transplanted from Boston to the small southern town of Bomont where loud music and dancing are prohibited. Not one to bow to the status quo, Ren challenges the ban, revitalizing the town and falling in love with the minister’s troub

recommendations.title: Coming 2 America
recommendations.overview: Prince Akeem Joffer is set to become King of Zamunda when he discovers he has a son he never knew about in America – a street savvy Queens native named Lavelle. Honoring his royal father's dying wish to groom this son as the crown prince, Akeem and S

recommendations.title: BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky
recommendations.overview: Record-shattering Korean girl band BLACKPINK tell their story —  and detail the hard fought journey of the dreams and trials behind their meteoric rise.

recommendations.title: I Still Believe
recommendations.overview: The true-life story of Christian music star Jeremy Camp and his journey of love and loss that looks to prove there is always hope.

recommendations.title: Gia
recommendations.overview: Gia Carangi meteorically rises to modeling fame in the late 1970s but becomes overconsumed by persistent loneliness and drug addiction.

recommendations.title: Rock Star
recommendations.overview: A wannabe rock star who fronts a Pennsylvania-based tribute band is devastated when his bandmates kick him out of the group he founded. Things begin to look up for Izzy when he is asked to join Steel Dragon, the heavy metal rockers he had been imitat

recommendations.title: Given
recommendations.overview: Haruki secretly had feelings for Akihiko for years, but Akihiko was still in a relationship with his roommate, the violinist Ugetsu Murata. Haruki, Akihiko, and Ugetsu's love clashes and starts to move forward.
